name: Barrick Gold Corporation
description: Barrick Gold Corporation is a leading international mining company primarily focused on the production and sale of gold and copper, with interests in mining operations and projects in 13 countries across North and South America, Africa, Papua New Guinea, and Saudi Arabia. The company's diversified portfolio includes some of the world's largest and most prolific gold and copper assets, such as the Nevada Gold Mines joint venture and the Kibali mine. Barrick is committed to creating long-term value for its stakeholders through responsible mining practices, operational excellence, and a disciplined approach to capital allocation.

investment_theses.company_type: Senior Gold Producer / Tier One Assets
